label: Generated location
description: Defines a generated world location, such as an asteroid field, that the world component location generator can spawn on a planet layer as a candidate world object.

layerDefs.label: Layer defs
layerDefs.description: Planet layers this generated location can appear on. If omitted, the game falls back to the surface layer only at runtime.

layerMaximum.label: Layer maximum
layerMaximum.description: Maximum number of this generated location allowed to exist simultaneously on a layer. -1 means unlimited.

worldObjectDef.label: World object def
worldObjectDef.description: World object type instantiated when this generated location is placed.

preciousResources.label: Precious resources
preciousResources.description: Candidate mineable ThingDefs; one is chosen at random as the precious resource for world objects implementing IResourceWorldObject.

TimeoutRangeDays.label: Timeout range days
TimeoutRangeDays.description: Range in days before the generated world object expires, used only when it implements IExpirableWorldObject and the range is non-zero.

weight.label: Weight
weight.description: Relative selection weight used when randomly picking among candidate GeneratedLocationDefs valid for a given planet layer tile.

basic-generated-location.label: Basic generated location
basic-generated-location.description: Generated location with a world object and the layers it can appear on.
